news.title: Oil tanker traffic in Strait of Hormuz jumps after U.S. and Iran implement deal to open sea lane
news.summary: The U.S.-Iran deal has raised questions about how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends.

news.title: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders
news.summary: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week. The company offered shares at a set price of $135. SpaceX shares are now valued at more than $1 billion.

news.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
news.summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage. Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with the shortage.

news.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
news.summary: Trump said he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression. Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated it to prevent a global Depression.

news.title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
news.summary: Bill Pulte is set to take on the role. President Donald Trump halted his nomination of U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence.

news.title: ‘We are habitually frugal’: My wife and I have money. How do we help our children without ruining their independence?
news.summary: “Partly due to some mental-health issues, they may continue to go through life living paycheck to paycheck, or worse,” she says.

news.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
news.summary: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries,” she says.

news.title: The loneliness crisis has gotten so bad that lawmakers are ready to spend millions of dollars to fight it
news.summary: The health damage of loneliness is similar to heavy smoking and obesity, experts say. Loneliness is linked to increased risk of depression, anxiety and cardiovascular disease, they say.

news.title: Chip stocks are setting records, but this hidden chart pattern says momentum favors the bears
news.summary: The SOXX’s RSI indicator has fallen further below the overbought threshold despite prices making record highs. History suggests that's a bad sign.

news.title: ‘I’ll probably be working until I die’: I’m 60, work as a waiter and have $2,000 in a Roth IRA. What will happen to me?
news.summary: "I'm afraid I’m in a bad place," he says. "I’ve been through a lot. I've had a lot of ups and downs"
